/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_service_type_support.dir/test/test_service_type_support.cpp.o -o test_service_type_support  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rosidl_runtime_c:/opt/ros/humble/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a librosidl_runtime_c.so -pthread /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
